speaker: speaker1
text: I think Yoga might be suitable for me .

speaker: speaker1
text: Because it doesn't require a lot of energy and thus easy to keep up .

speaker: speaker2
text: But I see people sweat a lot doing Yoga too .

speaker: speaker1
text: I don't know . I just need to try it once . I'm in urgent need of some exercise to lose some weight .

speaker: speaker2
text: You should try swimming then . It helps you to keep fit .
